scripts.test:rules: npm run guard:firebase && firebase --project compliance-hub-v2 emulators:exec --only firestore "vitest run --config vitest.rules.config.js"
scripts.emulators:functions: npm run guard:firebase && firebase --project compliance-hub-v2 emulators:start --only functions,firestore
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run guard:firebase && firebase --project compliance-hub-v2 deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:firestore: npm run guard:firebase && firebase --project compliance-hub-v2 deploy --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes
